content.en:
Soon after, Yanglong Zhenjun announced his departure from the Yangtian Palace, and joined the peripheral organization of the Void Heaven Hall with a group of people, and became Ye Tian's personal force, completely serving Ye Tian.

With the departure of Yang Long Zhenjun, the foundation of Yang Tian Temple in the Great Universe was completely destroyed, although there were still many peripheral members and a few core personnel, but the strength was too weak.

In addition, Ye Tian sold the area where the Yangtian Temple was located to the Pantheon Sect, so the Myriates Sect easily occupied this territory, and no one else interfered.

And the Pantheon Sect also ceded an area close to the territory of the Void Heaven Temple to Ye Tian, and Ye Tian let the human race settle here, occupy this place, and declare the belonging of this place.

In this way, the Yangtian Temple has completely become history in the great universe.

......

A region of Chaos.

Yang Tian True Ancestor knew about the situation of the Great Universe, and learned that the Great Universe Yang Heaven Temple, which he had paid a huge price, was completely destroyed, and many elites died in battle one by one, and even Yang Long True Monarch also rebelled, and he was immediately furious.

However, he had no way to enter the Great Universe for the time being, and he didn't dare to take revenge on the Void Heaven One Vein and the Immortal Gate, so he could only secretly eat this loss, and if he had the opportunity in the future, he would settle it one by one.

What many people don't know is that the changes in the Great Universe have attracted the attention of the Dao Ancestors.

this day.

A group of Dao Ancestor's consciousness incarnations appeared in front of the cosmic barrier outside the Great Universe, and they looked at the Great Universe one by one and began to discuss.

"I thought it would take another 10 billion years for the Great Universe to evolve into the Quasi-Dao Realm, but now it only takes 100,000 years to evolve into the Quasi-Dao Realm, this is not normal, I have never heard of such a thing!"

A Dao Ancestor wondered.

"It should be that something has happened in the Great Universe, could it have something to do with the Dark Temple? The Dark Temple Master of the Dark Temple is very mysterious and has an unusual origin. We don't even know which era of Dao Ancestor, and we have never seen his true face, maybe he did it!" another Dao Ancestor guessed.

"It's possible, it seems that the Dark God Temple has sent another group of people in privately, and even has the power of Dao Ancestor. Although there is no evidence that it is the Dao Ancestor of the Dark God Temple, it is only possible that they did it!"

A Dao Ancestor said coldly, it seemed that he was very unaccustomed to the people of the Dark Temple.

"Hahaha, are you arranging our Dark Temple again?"

A young man in black armor and robes appeared on the cosmic barrier of the Great Universe.

He wears a mask, even the power of Dao Ancestor is difficult to penetrate this mask, and even this person's aura is very weird, changing from moment to moment, as if no one knows his true breath.

But all the Dao Ancestors present knew this young man.

He was one of the Dao Ancestors who often acted outside in the Dark Temple—Ghost-Faced Dao Ancestor!

"Ghost Face, I didn't arrange your Dark Temple, isn't it your Dark Temple's ghost this time that the Great Universe has changed?"

The War God Temple's War Blade Dao Ancestor said coldly.

"Hehe!" Ghost-faced Dao Ancestor smiled gloomily: "This time, you didn't guess wrong, this matter really has something to do with our Dark God Temple, we just experimented, I didn't expect it to be really successful! "

"What the hell is going on?"

One by one, Dao Ancestors locked up the Ghost Face Dao Ancestor, if the Ghost Face Dao Ancestor didn't say anything, they would probably take tough measures.

"Ladies and gentlemen, do you want to do it, if it weren't for our Dark Temple, the Great Universe wouldn't have evolved so quickly, and you probably would have wasted a lot of time, isn't this situation very good now?"

"Ghost Face, don't talk nonsense, what is the specific situation?If you don't say it, our various clans will do their best to eliminate the power of your Dark God Temple!" one of the Dao Ancestors of the Immortal Gate threatened.

"Okay, okay, I'll just say it!" Ghost-faced Dao Ancestor hurriedly said.

He wasn't going to hide it, after all, he couldn't hide this matter, if he really let the major forces find out, I'm afraid he would go all out to deal with their Dark Temple.

Although the power of the Dark Temple in the Great Universe is not weak, and it even has hole cards, it is absolutely unable to resist all the forces.

Therefore, the Dark Temple will not look for death, otherwise, it would not take the initiative to reveal the news.

"It's very simple, this future Dao Realm is different from the normal Dao Realm, for example, the current Great Universe, there are too many good things, haven't you found it? Source Land, Innate Origin Land, Ancestral Monument, Star Dzi and so on, this is the Great Universe! What is the value of the ordinary Great Universe, and this Universe has only just become a Great Universe, so many good things have been born, if it becomes the Dao Realm, then it will be enough? Maybe at that time, the treasures born in this Dao Realm are enough to make us all crazy, and even fight for it!"

Saying this, the Dao ancestors present suddenly realized.

In fact, many Dao Ancestors also had doubts about this before, and they were also very curious that the resources of this great universe were too rich, but after careful exploration, they found nothing, so they stopped exploring, and only thought that this great universe was just rich in resources, and it was good luck that it happened to give birth to these good things.

But now, the words of the Ghost-faced Dao Ancestor made them perceive another piece of information, this great universe or the future Dao Realm is not simple.

At this time, the Ghost-faced Dao Ancestor continued: "After our Dark God Temple learned about the anomaly of this great universe, we began to study and explore, and in a test not long ago, we finally made it clear that the origin of this universe should be the two universes before the fusion of this great universe, one of which is not simple, that is, the universe where the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is located. That universe seems to be just the most ordinary universe, but it is not a naturally born universe, but a universe transformed by the origin fragments of the domain realm!"

"What, Domain Origin Fragment, this ...... How is this possible!!!"

Many Dao Ancestors were shocked.

Others didn't know what the Domain Origin Fragment was, and even the True Ancestors didn't know what the Domain Origin Fragment was, but the Dao Ancestors basically knew what it was.

The Domain Realm can be said to be a taboo in Chaos, because the Domain Realm overrides the Dao Realm.

But no one had ever seen a domain boundary, because there was no domain in this chaotic realm.

How big the chaos is, they Dao Ancestors actually don't know, it is boundless, and in an incomparably distant place, there is a forbidden area that blocks the creatures of this Chaos Territory, and even blocks the Dao Ancestors.

There were once Dao Ancestors who went deep into the forbidden area, but they all disappeared one by one, and no one came back.

Gradually, the Dao Ancestors no longer set foot there.

But for a long time, some things have spread out of the forbidden area, and among them are records about the domain realm.

The domain realm surpasses the Dao realm, and each domain realm is extremely powerful, and it is a world built by a great existence above the Dao Ancestor, not a natural birth.

The Origin Fragment of the Domain Realm is the Origin Fragment formed after the Domain Realm is broken, and it can form the universe over a long period of time.

But this is a secret that only the people of the Dark Temple know, and the other Dao Ancestors don't know.

"If the fragments of the Domain Realm form a universe, we will definitely be able to sense the breath of the Domain Realm, but now that we don't feel it, how can you people from the Dark Temple know?"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor asked.

"Hahahaha, because the spirit contained in the fragment of the domain is hidden, not hidden in the origin of the universe, and you have not mastered the method of probing the spirit of the domain realm, so naturally you can't find it. However, after the Great Universe became the Quasi-Dao Realm, the spirit of the Domain Realm must also merge with the Origin of the Universe, otherwise it would not be possible to be promoted successfully. "

Ghost-faced Daozu said.
